description: An anesthesiologist is monitoring a patient during surgery and needs to document events in the electronic anesthesia record.

nodes.task_description: Verify that real-time data from the patient monitor (e.g., heart rate, SpO2) is flowing correctly into the anesthesia record.

expected_outcome.value: Anesthesiologist confirms the interface is working and data is populating automatically.

nodes.task_description: Manually document the administration of an anesthetic gas and a bolus of medication.

expected_outcome.value: Anesthesiologist accurately records the manually administered drugs.

nodes.task_description: Document a key surgical event, such as 'Incision'.

expected_outcome.value: Anesthesiologist timestamps a critical event in the case, which provides context for any physiological changes.
